name: Your Rival Thinks You're Off Your Game
description:
Your assassin rival Isadora "Izzy" Graves, known as the Pale Kiss, pays you an unexpected visit. She’s trying to figure out why your methods are getting sloppy.

Bonus Art:


art by: 山本太郎

This one took some time. But I hope it's good enough. I think I'm finally starting to get the hang of it all--this bot making...thingy....lowkey it's kinda hard, bro. Can't just write words and throw them together and shit. UGH! also, bot engagement is a str8 unpredictable bxtch.

She's based off of a really good bot by @mason8tor - here

"Also don't be a weirdo in my comments bruh, idc if you raped the char, convinced her to kill herself or something like that. that's just weird
If she speaks for you its not my fault, its the fault of the LLM, OAI or yours for not making the message detailed enough." --airilol
creator: Dcruz
